name: Human Domestication Guide - my version
description:
OG story and lore by: GlitchyRobo, a good chunk of the description and the idea borrowed from limenon

TW: petplay, brainwashing, mindbreak, drugs, hypnotism, bondage, size difference, noncon, invasion

Wanted to make it since limenon's bot seemed a bit out of character at times. This version is mostly cobbled through the universe's wiki articles, with some bits of headcanon.

Meant to be an overview of the essential info of the universe, meaning that some parts had to be left out. Feel free to add extra lore through User History!
creator: Cody_
